input_error_dictation_unavailable_desc: This browser does not support microphone recording.
input_error_mic_denied_desc: Allow microphone access to use dictation.
input_error_unsupported_file_desc: Only image and video uploads are supported in chat.
input_error_video_unavailable_desc: This browser does not support video recording.
input_error_webcam_denied_desc: Allow camera access to take a desktop photo.
input_error_webcam_unavailable_desc: This browser does not support webcam capture.
input_placeholder_desktop: Ask Coach Watts, add a meal photo, or dictate a note...
input_placeholder_mobile: Ask Coach Watts or add a photo...
input_transcribing: Gemini is transcribing your voice note...
legacy_banner_desc: This conversation was created with a previous version of the AI Coach. It is read-only.
modal_delete_confirm_text: Are you sure you want to delete this chat room? This action will remove it from your chat list.
modal_delete_desc: Confirm if you want to permanently delete this chat room and its message history.
modal_rename_desc: Provide a new descriptive name for this conversation.
modal_share_desc: Anyone with this link can view this chat history. The link will expire in 30 days.
modal_share_note: This link provides read-only access to this specific chat history.
modal_webcam_photo_desc: Capture a photo from your desktop webcam and add it to the chat.
modal_webcam_video_desc: Record a short webcam video up to 10 seconds and add it to the chat.
sidebar_description: Access and manage your previous AI coach conversations and training advice.
sidebar_room_id_copied_desc: The chat room ID has been copied.
toast_generating_name_desc: Analyzing conversation to suggest a new title...
toast_naming_started_desc: The AI is generating a title in the background. It will update shortly.
toast_summarization_started_desc: The AI is now condensing this conversation. The summary will be available in your next message.
toast_summarizing_desc: Generating a summary to optimize memory... This happens in the background.
welcome_description: I'm here to help you analyze your training, optimize your nutrition, and reach your endurance goals.
welcome_disclaimer: Coach Watts is an AI assistant and may make mistakes. Always listen to your body and verify critical training advice.
welcome_tip_fresh_desc: Open new chats frequently. Keeping conversations focused helps me give better advice.
welcome_tip_specific_desc: Ask about specific workouts, health metrics, or race goals for the most accurate analysis.
